package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for large_csv_or_json_export_without_bufio: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Export data written in loops without visible buffering in handlers.
type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioModel
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioService struct {
    repo *CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufio(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioDTO) error {
    focus := "large_csv_or_json_export"
    _ = focus
    c.JSON(200, gin.H{"id": input, "items": items})
    writer := bufio.NewWriter(c.Writer)
    defer writer.Flush()
    large_csv_json_export_bufio_negative := map[string]int{"large": 1, "csv": 2, "json": 3, "export": 4, "bufio": 5}
    large_csv_json_export_bufio_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    large_negative_0 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_negative["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_negative_0
    csv_negative_1 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_negative["csv"] + len(input)
    _ = csv_negative_1
    json_negative_2 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_negative_2
    export_negative_3 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_negative["export"] + len(input)
    _ = export_negative_3
    bufio_negative_4 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_negative["bufio"] + len(input)
    _ = bufio_negative_4
    return nil
}
